notes: Bus-powered via USB-C; no mains power port. Desktop form factor — not rack-mountable, rackUnits omitted. The 3.5mm port is definitively a stereo line input (not a combo in/out jack) per the official spec page. No source documentation specifies which panel (front or rear) the 3.5mm jack is located on, so no panel location is asserted.

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: Unencrypted HDMI input from gaming source; supports up to 4K144

ports.name: USB-C (Data/Power)
ports.note: USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C; connects to host computer and powers the device — no separate power supply

ports.name: 3.5mm Stereo Line In
ports.note: Stereo line-level input; intended for use with Chat Link Pro accessory
